title: JavaScript Debugging Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of console methods, debugger statements, and browser developer tools in JavaScript.

questions.question: Which of the following console methods displays an array as a table in the browser's console?
What is the primary role of the debugger statement in JavaScript?
options: It clears the current console logs.
It pauses the execution of code and opens the available debugger tool.
It removes all breakpoints from a script.
It checks if a script contains errors without executing it.

questions.question: In Chrome Developer Tools, where can you set manual breakpoints and step through execution line by line?
Which console method can you use to track how long a specific piece of code takes to execute?
Which browser shortcut is often used to open the browser developer tools?
